tuition_rows_grouped_by_faculty.notes: Official MEU graduate tuition schedule applies to all four inventoried MASTER programs.

notes: MEU publishes a shared graduate tuition rate of USD 305 per credit, a graduate application fee of USD 85, a registration fee of USD 220, and an MBA business program fee of USD 135 per semester / USD 85 per summer. All tuition and fee references resolve to official MEU sources only.
